data.title: Orestone announces $2M non-brokered private placement
data.description:
• Orestone Mining (TSXV:ORS:CA) announced a non-brokered private placement on Friday consisting of up to 25M units at a price of $0.08 per unit for aggregate gross proceeds of up to $2M. 
  • Each unit will consist of one common share of the company and one common share purchase warrant. Each warrant will be exercisable for one common share of the company at a price of $0.16 for one year from the date of issuance.
  • The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering i) to further develop its Francisca property located in Salta Province, Argentina; ii) to further develop its Captain property located in the Province of British Columbia, Canada; and iii) for general administrative expenses and working capital purposes.

data.title: Shopify names Jessica Hertz as new COO; chief revenue officer steps down
data.description:
Shopify (NASDAQ:SHOP) has promoted Jessica Hertz to Chief Operating Officer, effective October 9.

Her promotion follows the departure of Bobby Morrison as the Canadian tech company’s Chief Revenue Officer. Morrison has been with Shopify (NASDAQ:SHOP) since 2022.

Hertz assumes the COO role left vacant by Kaz Nejatian last month who left for Opendoor. She previously served as Shopify’s (NASDAQ:SHOP) General Counsel, overseeing the company’s global legal, communications, policy, talent, and trust teams. Hertz also served as Biden’s principal deputy counsel while the former U.S. President was Vice President.

“My operating system as COO: make the work visible, shorten feedback loops, deliver in smaller increments, own outcomes end-to-end,” Hertz said in a LinkedIn post. “When the work is visible, ownership is clean, and defaults are sharp, winning is the side effect.”

Her appointment was announced through a  filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

Shopify (SHOP) shares are fractionally higher into Friday’s open after closing more than 1.5% lower on Thursday.

data.title: WisdomTree reports higher AUM as of September-end
data.description:
WisdomTree (NYSE:WT) announced on Friday September-end assets under management of $137.18B, compared to $131.14B at the beginning of the month.

The increase reflects continued growth in both the U.S. and Europe business lines.

Net inflows totaled $813M as of the month's end.

By asset class, International Dev. Mkt Equity saw inflows worth $324M, Emerging Market Equity of $42M, Commodity & Currency of $688M, Alternatives of $146M, and Cryptocurrency of $754M.

Meanwhile, the U.S. Equity asset class saw outflows worth $48M, Fixed Income of $1.04B, and Leveraged & Inverse of $52M.

data.title: Nvidia gaining share in cloud capex, new AI applications 'just getting started,' MS says
data.description:
Investment firm Morgan Stanley held a meeting with Nvidia's (NASDAQ:NVDA) management and there were several takeaways, including that the tech giant is gaining share in cloud spending.

“Investor focus is primarily on the demand picture, where management enthusiasm on both near-term and long-term outlook continues to strengthen,” analysts at the firm, led by Joseph Moore, wrote in a note to clients. “The commentary here was that most of the demand growth we have seen so far has been mostly higher revenue capture within a strong cloud capex growth trajectory, mostly capturing the migration from CPU to GPU within existing application workloads. That will continue to grow, but the broadly transformative AI use cases are not even really here yet.”

Moore has an Overweight rating and $210 price target on Nvidia.

In addition, Moore noted that many new artificial intelligence applications are just getting started, including in areas like healthcare, legal services and industrial automation seen as “the next big waves.”

“Over time, robotics is expected to extend this automation into physical domains, with new model categories emerging to serve each vertical,” the analysts added. “This is all driving its view that the AI infrastructure markets will be $3-5 trillion in CY2030, a higher number than we are baking in but consistent with the view that AI will have these transformative effects on global markets.”

Moore also said the issue of vendor financing — which has become of great concern in recent days, given the recent deal with OpenAI (OPENAI) — is more about being an accelerant than creating demand. 

“Nvidia's investment approach is to find leverage points where it can accelerate innovation,” Moore explained. “As an example, CoreWeave and sovereign investments in the UK and London were designed to speed up [data center] capacity expansions and innovation, and as those methods can be extended to other companies in the space.”

Lastly, Nvidia's management did not seem overly concerned about AMD's (AMD) further push (especially with its deal with OpenAI), as cloud service providers are dependent upon Nvidia to build capacity for its GPUs.

“Many competitors can build chips that do one thing very well, but Nvidia’s full-stack approach and the flexibility of the GPU give it a durable lead,” Moore added.

data.title: NBA games come back to Macau amid strong local interest
data.description:
An NBA preseason game between the Phoenix Suns and Brooklyn Nets will take place on Friday in Macau as part of the league's globalization effort. The same two teams will also play on Sunday.

Both games are taking place at the Venetian Arena, a premier indoor venue located on the Cotai Strip within The Venetian Macao Resort owned by Sands China (OTCPK:SCHYY) (OTCPK:SCHYF) (NYSE:LVS). Notably, the games are part of a multi-year partnership between the NBA and Sands China (OTCPK:SCHYY), aimed at positioning Macau as a global hub for sports-driven tourism and luxury events beyond the traditional focus on casino gaming.

Early reports indicate strong interest from Chinese tourists in the NBA games, despite the extended Golden Week holiday just ending earlier in the week.

The venue for the NBA games, the Venetian Macao Resort, is a massive luxury hotel and casino complex located on Macau's Cotai Strip, modeled after its Las Vegas counterpart and featuring Italian-inspired architecture, indoor canals, and replicas of Venetian landmarks. The resort regularly hosts both sports events and concerts in its main event space, the Venetian Arena. 

Sands China (OTCPK:SCHYY) fell 5.5% in Friday trading in Hong Kong after being on an extended winning streak.

data.title: StrategX issues 2.34M shares in debt settlement
data.description: • StrategX Elements (OTCPK:STRXF) has now issued an aggregate of 2.34M common shares at a deemed price of $0.18 per share to settle aggregate debt of $421,615.

data.title: CVS Health, Clover update on Medicare Star Ratings for 2026
data.description:
CVS Health’s (NYSE:CVS) Aetna unit and Clover Health (NASDAQ:CLOV) announced their Medicare Star Ratings for 2026 after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) released data from its quality review, which allows health insurers with top-rated Medicare plans to receive bonus payments.

Following the CMS announcement, Wilmington, Delaware-based Clover (NASDAQ:CLOV) said that the agency has rated its PPO Medicare Advantage plans with 3.5 Stars and its HMO Medicare Advantage plan with 4.0 Stars.

The CMS annually evaluates Medicare plans for quality and issues ratings on a scale of one to five Stars, with bonus payments awarded to health insurers operating plans rated four stars and above, making it a key determinant of their financial performance. The 2026-Star ratings impact the payment year 2027.

The update comes as the next Medicare Open Enrollment period is set to get underway from Oct. 15 to Dec. 7 to give Americans, mainly those aged 65 and older, the option to compare 2026 MA plans.

After the CMS released its 2025-Star Ratings last year, Clover (NASDAQ:CLOV) said that the agency has increased the star ratings of its PPO MA plans and HMO MA plans to 4 stars and 3.5 stars, respectively.

“From a health policy perspective, Clover also notes that it does not believe the overall Star rating reflects the excellent health outcomes that it delivers to its members,” the company added in a press release on Thursday.

Meanwhile, Aetna, the health insurer operated by CVS Health (NYSE:CVS), said that more than 81% of its MA members are in Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug (MAPD) plans rated 4 stars or above for 2026. The company added that over 63% of Aetna MA enrollees are in a 4.5-star plan for 2026.

Citing an Oppenheimer research note, Reuters reported that 64% of Americans are enrolled in Medicare Advantage plans for prescription drugs rated four or five stars by the CMS.

Additionally, citing data from the regulator and companies, the news outlet noted that 78%, 55%, and 20% of members served by UnitedHealth (UNH), Elevance (ELV), and Humana (HUM), respectively are in top-rated Medicare plans

2026-Star Ratings data for UnitedHealth (UNH) and Humana (HUM) are in line with the companies’ prior announcements.

data.title: Virtus Investment Partners estimates assets under management of $171.1B
data.description:
• Virtus Investment (NYSE: NYSE:VRTS) reported preliminary AUM of $169.3B and other fee-earning assets of $1.8B for total client assets of $171.1B as of September 30, 2025.
  • The company's AUM included $55,563M in open-end, $10,667M in close-end, $46,798M in separate retail accounts, and $55,936M in institutional accounts, reflecting a total of $169,307M in the month of September.

data.title: Lennar launches exchange offer for remaining Millrose shares
data.description:
Lennar (NYSE:LEN) announced on Friday an offer to exchange the remaining portion of Millrose Properties (NYSE:MRP) shares for its class A common stock.

In February, the homebuilder completed a taxable spin-off of Millrose Properties.

The distribution of ~80% of the outstanding class A and class B shares of Millrose to Lennar stockholders was completed on February 7.

The current exchange offer, which begins immediately and expires on November 7, is for the remaining ~20% of the outstanding shares of Millrose in exchange for Lennar stock at a 6% discount.

Lennar owned 33,298,764 shares of Millrose class A common stock at October 7.

The discount is subject to an upper limit of 4.1367 shares of Millrose class A common stock per share of Lennar class A common stock.

The final exchange ratio will be announced by 9:00 AM New York City time, on the trading day immediately preceding the expiration date of the exchange offer.

If the exchange offer is not fully subscribed, Lennar intends to dispose of the Millrose shares through a subsequent spin-off, split-off, public offering, private sale or any combination of these potential transactions.

data.title: Mosaic stock slips as Q3 phosphate sales lag production
data.description:
Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) on Friday said production and sales volumes for potash in the third quarter were both approximately 2.3 million tonnes, while phosphate sales came in at 1.6 million tonnes, trailing production due to shipment timing delays, sending shares 10% lower in early trading.

Sales volumes for Mosaic Fertilizantes in the third quarter were approximately 2.8 million tons, a 25% increase from the second quarter, the company said in a statement.

On the second-quarter earnings call, Mosaic discussed delays in asset health restoration activities within the phosphate segment.

While the company hit its production targets for several weeks after completing maintenance in August, unexpected mechanical issues at the Riverview sulfuric acid plant and utility interruptions at Bartow in mid-September led to a sharp drop in output.

As a result, third-quarter phosphate production volumes of approximately 1.7 million tons, while meaningfully higher than previous quarters, fell below management's expectations. 

"These issues have since been addressed, and Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) expects that the asset health investments completed to date will lead to a sustainable improvement in production rates going forward," the company said.

Mosaic, which mines, produces, and distributes millions of tons of potash and phosphate products each year, fell 10% to $30.17. The company will report Q3 earnings on Tuesday, November 4, after market close.
